findings: swarm-state.json initial write (stampede.sh:832) is NOT atomic — direct open+dump, no tmp+replace
fleet.json write (stampede.sh:844) is NOT atomic — direct open+dump
state.json teardown update (stampede.sh:355) is NOT atomic — in-place read+write
write_json_atomic uses .tmp suffix; swarm_progress.py uses .tmp- prefix — both consistent with each other but monitor's exclude glob (! -name '.tmp-*') only covers prefix pattern
commander agent specifies atomic bundle write; mechanism left to implementer
3 non-atomic writes on files continuously read by monitor
